user.title: Tuya Smart Life Local
user.description: Login with your Smart Life or Tuya Smart email/phone account, then select one or more homes to sync.

select_homes.title: Select homes

error.invalid_client: The bundled Tuya mobile client profile was rejected by Tuya.
